task_description: Iteration 2 of the review-fix-optimize loop: harden all 16 remaining personas (score clamping, division guards), fix coordinator edge cases, add MCP input validation, prevent dashboard XSS, and add regression tests.

verification.summary: 99 tests pass (86 existing + 13 new). All 18 personas handle extreme/zero inputs without crash. Coordinator handles empty/error results. MCP ticker validation tested with both regex pattern and helper function. Review findings addressed (renderMarkdown escaping fix, MCP validator integration test).
